introSection: Legendary Twin Dragon is an Intamin inverted launched shuttle roller coaster located at Chongqing Sunac Land in Shapingba, Chongqing, China. It opened on 3 February 2021 as the tallest and fastest inverted coaster.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 32 riders.

fullText:
Legendary Twin Dragon is an Intamin inverted launched shuttle roller coaster located at Chongqing Sunac Land in Shapingba, Chongqing, China. It opened on 3 February 2021 as the tallest and fastest inverted coaster.



Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 32 riders.
